description_long: This is a black hardcover book with a simple, bold design. The cover features white, stylized text at the top, and the surface appears smooth and slightly reflective. The book's spine is also black, with white text and a small red circular detail near the bottom. The edges of the pages are visible and have a light, off-white color, indicating standard paper material. There are no visible illustrations or artwork on the cover, giving it a minimalist appearance. The book is of average thickness and size, suitable for carrying or placing on a shelf.
description: A black hardcover book with white stylized text on the cover and spine, featuring a minimalist, smooth design and visible off-white page edges.
description_view_0: The front cover is fully visible, showing the white stylized text on a plain black background.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the black cover and the off-white page edges, with the title text partially visible.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, showing a plain black surface with no text or illustration, and the page edges are also visible.
description_view_3: The spine is visible, displaying white text and a small red circular detail, along with the black cover and page edges.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is black with white, horizontally oriented text and a small red circular detail near the bottom. The design is minimalist and matches the front cover.
